name: GENIUS Listing / Acceptance Pack
outcome: Three-step stablecoin issuer conformance pack for GENIUS Act monthly attestations: a pre-issuance reserve attestation check for 1:1 coverage and asset-class eligibility, the GENIUS Act monthly reserve disclosure lint against S.394 Section 4, and an issuer key revocation status check against a supplied BitstringStatusList credential. Composes into a bundle receipt of continuous conformance for an exchange listing desk or a mid-market stablecoin issuer, replacing a static PDF attestation with replayable evidence. Verify-only; asserts only the three conditions it checked, never a broader solvency or safe-to-list guarantee. The receipt does not yet carry a receipt:// resolver link (pending the N1 MCP Resources work) or witness-cosigned anchors (pending SPEC-TICK-088 Section WITNESS-1); both are planned upgrades, not missing requirements.
